title: Bindings, Scope, Closures, and Lifetime · Language Lens: Garbage Reachability
summary: Build configurable counters and validators without leaking mutable state across community-service widgets. Planned artifact: Add and verify the js garbage reachability increment in a closure-backed state and validation library. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Reason about reachability, event-listener cleanup, weak references, and accidental retention without manual memory control.
Preserve per-iteration bindings in callbacks and asynchronous work without index drift.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
